name: read_portfolio
description: Read a user's investment portfolio from the database. Returns all holdings with tickers, shares, and values. Can optionally filter by a specific portfolio ID.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user whose portfolio to read.

portfolio_id.description: Optional specific portfolio ID to retrieve. If omitted, all portfolios for the user are returned.

name: read_analysis_cache
description: Read previously cached analysis results for a stock ticker. Returns the cached data if available, otherwise indicates no cache exists.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL).

analysis_type.description: The type of analysis to look up (e.g. fundamental, technical, sentiment, risk).

name: parse_csv_holdings
description: Parse a base64-encoded brokerage CSV file into structured portfolio holdings. Automatically detects common column formats from major brokerages. Returns parsed tickers, shares, prices, values, and portfolio weights.

csv_content.description: Base64-encoded CSV content from a brokerage export file.
